dialogos.texto_en: Hey, hey, Futaro-kun?
...What's with that face?\nIs it okay for an actress to make such a face?
You came at just the right time.
You too, Yotsuba...
(I have a feeling this is going to be\n a troublesome conversation...)
There was something I was curious about.\nYotsuba and I were talking, so let's check the answer.
What answer are you checking?
I'll ask you straight out!\nYou suggested snorkeling for Itsuki's sake, right?
Ooh...
Ding ding ding! I'm correct!
Don't say it yourself!
But it's the right answer, isn't it?
...How did you know?\nIt's not like we were hiding it or anything.
Well, if you listen to the conversation\nbetween the two of you after snorkeling,\nyou can't help but know.
Also, since you're not good at exercise,\nsuggesting snorkeling gave it away.
(I see. Well, I would have wondered why\n if Miku had suggested it.)
Sorry for deciding based on my own circumstances.
Oh no, no!\nIt's okay for a lover\nto prioritize what they want to do!
O-okay...
Actually, as her big sister, I'm relieved.\nYou're starting to act more like a couple.
Yep, yep.\nAs her big sister, I'm relieved too.
Big sister...
I'm her big sister too, you know?!
As for Ichika,\nI sometimes forget\nthat you're also Itsuki's older sister.
Whaaa?! Why is that?\nI think about my little sister all the time!
Well, that's just how it is for older siblings.\nI'm always worried about Raiha too.
Yeah, that's just how it is\nwith older sisters and brothers.
But, Futaro-kun has it tough too, huh?
Huh? What do you mean all of a sudden?
I mean, you have four sisters who are all so fond\nof their little sister's boyfriend, right?\nThat boyfriend must have a hard time.
Are you trying to make it hard for me?\nGive me a break.
Hmm, it all depends on your actions, you know?\nPerhaps... Teeheeheeee.
That laugh is scary!
Please be careful, okaaay?\nWe'll always be on Itsuki's side.
...Come to think of it, Itsuki is the youngest.\nI don't have much of an image of that though.
Even though it still might be true,\nItsuki-chan used to be really attached to our Mom,\nand seemed like the youngest even back then.
We all love our mom, but especially Itsuki\ndidn't want to be separated from her.
There's also your dad. \nIt's definitely not just a small commotion,\nno matter how you look at it.
Ahaha...\nDad is a tougher opponent than us, after all.
Don't be too scared.\nDad is just a regular human being, you know?
Yeah, he's just a regular guy.\nA father who loves his daughters.\nThat's what makes him a formidable opponent.
...I see what you mean.
In that case, you have no choice but to confront him\nhead-on in a normal way, Futaro-kun.
Yeah, that's all I can do.
...Come to think of it, Itsuki is the youngest.\nI don't have much of an image of that though.
Even though it still might be true,\nItsuki-chan used to be really attached to our Mom,\nand seemed like the youngest even back then.
We all love our mom, but especially Itsuki\ndidn't want to be separated from her.
I don't really think it's a big deal, though.\nI actually think I'm lucky.
Huh...
I'm glad you all are quintuplets.\nWe are who we are today because the four of you supported\nItsuki and I.
Teehee!\nYou're saying the same thing as Itsuki-chan.
Right-?\nThe two of you are really alike.
Besides, I was only just kidding.\nI get embarrassed when people take me seriously.
Wh-what, you said it, so deal with it.\nI actually meant what I said, you know?
Uuugh!\nPlease spaaare uuus!
...Come to think of it, Itsuki is the youngest.\nI don't have much of an image of that though.
Even though it still might be true,\nItsuki-chan used to be really attached to our Mom,\nand seemed like the youngest even back then.
We all love our mom, but especially Itsuki\ndidn't want to be separated from her.
Oh, so there was a time like that, huh?
Oh? Are you interested?\nYou want to know about your lover's past that badly?
It...it's not like that.
Okay then, that's the end of the story.
Sure, I'm fine with that.
(...Actually, I'm quite curious.\n Ugh, why am I being so stubborn!)
What's more important than the past\nis the future, right?
What kind of future will Itsuki and Uesugi-san\nmove towards? That's more important.
...Yeah.
Alright!\nThen let's ask Futaro-kun about the future.
Huh?
When will you start living together with Itsuki-chan?\nAfter graduating from university?
Wh-what are you talking about?!
I'm curious about that too.\nSo, please tell us your thoughts, Uesugi-san!
E-even Yotsuba...!
Come on, come on, tell us?
...Well, the future is important!\nBut the present is still the most important thing!
We came all the way to Okinawa\nand we're at the beach! Let's play!
Ah, he ran away.
Wait for me, Uesugi-saaan!
